meta.source: IGRSUP मूल्यांकन सूची (circle rate), SRO जेवर / Jewar, Gautam Buddh Nagar
meta.unit: INR per hectare, agricultural land (कृषक भूमि की दरें प्रति हैक्टेयर)
meta.columns: road = on-road frontage (सड़क पर), adjacent = adjacent to road (सड़क से सटी), general = interior/general (सामान्य भूमि)
meta.match_note: keys are village names with spaces removed, to match Bhu-Naksha village names
meta.coverage: 3 of ~93 Jewar villages (pilot); rest to be parsed from the same rate book
